channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel's Undisclosed Stock Buy in Bitcoin Giant Strategy Is Down 44%
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel failed to disclose a significant purchase of stock in Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy from last November.

item.title: JUST IN Bitcoin reclaims $62,000. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5adWlmRFhCRHY5OFRiNVNuSE0ycV9xV1MwakNzR0QtdUJZYzJjcFd6Q2JsYW9aS09teGxEbktoWDF6ZGVlMnRIbHVUbjRpcWJzMjdpUmtzbjlQMV9IR2prVkFR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN Bitcoin reclaims $62,000.<…

item.title: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions
item.description: Standard Chartered is the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutions mint and redeem Circle's USDC.

item.title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
item.description: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

item.title: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin in Q2 as Buying Pace Cools
item.description: The Japanese firm's 43,000-BTC stack now sits well below its cost basis, and it has leaned on debt over equity to keep buying.

item.title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
item.description: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

item.title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
item.description: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Morning Minute: Robinhood Debuts 'Robinhood Chain'
item.description: The market liked it with HOOD shares jumping 8% and their crypto perp dex partner up even more. Plus crypto's latest unicorn is crowned.

item.title: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
item.description: Standard Chartered and Circle launch bank-led USDC minting and redemption for institutions, starting in Dubai’s DIFC with planned global expansion.

item.title: Bitget is bridging crypto and traditional finance with a new suite of industry-leading products built to make trading simpler, faster, and more accessible. Tune in to our CEO’s Mid-Year Speech and discover how Bitget UEX is reshaping the future of trading. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9xU2VuUzMtTndQUWstOXJia0RXWHNhMzN4N1Ffc2tKLWo5S09yVUtKQlNIRXAzTzRlaWV1dnJDR29tTmNJc3NlLU84bURwT1prbmY3Xy1uMG1TT1E?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitget is bridging crypto and traditional f…

item.title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
item.description: The Solana Foundation launched a framework for protocol-level governance, enabling validators with at least 100,000 delegated SOL to publish new proposals.

item.title: SBI Crypto shuts Bitcoin mining pool after 5-year run
item.description: SBI Crypto will shut down its Bitcoin mining pool on July 31 after more than five years, ranking 12th globally with about 2.2% of hashrate share.

item.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin slowdown ends 3-year run for crypto-native products
item.description: Yield-bearing stablecoin supply fell 15% in Q2 as sUSDe and sUSDS contracted, while Treasury-backed products including BUIDL, USYC and USDY continued to grow.

item.title: OFAC sanctions 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses as Tether freezes funds
item.description: OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses linked to ISIS-K to its sanctions list, including 131 Tron addresses that received more than $1.4 million in crypto donations, according to Chainalysis.

item.title: Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to US Over $8M Crypto Ransom Demand
item.description: The teenager allegedly helped to breach a luxury jeweler and demand $8 million in crypto, as part of a crew tied to $100 million in ransoms.

item.title: Taiko reopens bridge after $1.7M exploit, says users made whole
item.description: Taiko restored bridge transfers after replenishing asset backing and completing security fixes following an 11-day network disruption.

item.title: Metaplanet buys 2,823 BTC, surpasses 43,000 in Bitcoin holdings
item.description: Metaplanet bought 2,823 Bitcoin during the second quarter, reducing its average acquisition cost to $106,500 per BTC, and reported $10.9 million in revenue from its income generation strategy.

item.title: OpenAI weighs 5% stake for US government amid Trump talks: FT
item.description: OpenAI has reportedly discussed giving the US government a 5% equity stake in early Trump administration talks as Washington tightens AI model oversight.

item.title: *Metaplanet Acquires Additional 2,823 Bitcoin, Total Holdings Reach 43,000 BTC* - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9VbmJQSWFJMjJkTW44XzNOZUlwWDRNa0poUDJMd1ZmaFg3eXFXWTVoTWliUnp0NklwbVlLeTFnWEZGQ3lDU2ZQeTVFTWNXRTdyS09ranM4Sm4yMFFnLW5xQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">*Metaplanet Acquires Additional 2,82…

item.title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
item.description: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.

item.title: France to strengthen response as crypto wrench attacks hit 77
item.description: French Interior Minister Laurent Nuñez promised a “more ambitious” three-part plan to reinforce security measures for the crypto sector.

item.title: Dubai crypto market hits 50 licensed firms after new VARA approval
item.description: Dubai’s VARA has licensed its 50th crypto firm, though only 39 VASPs were fully operational at the end of 2025 as the emirate’s regulated market continues to expand.

item.title: Analyst warns BTC could drop further after worst June since 2022
item.description: The June close above realized price but below the 200-week moving average “signals the bear bottom is still ahead per prior cycles,” one analyst said.

item.title: Venice AI becomes unicorn after $65M Series A as AI privacy concerns grow
item.description: The funding round is Venice AI’s first external capital raise since it launched in May 2024.

item.title: Trumps’ American Bitcoin sinks 8.4% ahead of reverse stock split to stay listed
item.description: The Trump sons' American Bitcoin hit a low on Wednesday ahead of the company’s reverse stock split, which aims to buoy shares and keep it on the Nasdaq.

item.title: BREAKING: Total crypto card deposits have officially crossed above $10 billion for the first time in history. This puts total deposits up +82% year-to-date and nearly +250% year-over-year. The surge comes amid a rapid adoption of stablecoins as a payment rail, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1LczNJY3czVk5Hc2p4UGI5QWoySWRxUXlEZ3dtd3JtdTVsWjBFRkkxWm9iVGVoaHR4TGpNZUFEUXdVN2VPZk1uVDFTNkJqZnRBaVU0QW53VVhpdGpYdnRaOUh3NTc3Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Total crypto card …

item.title: Bitcoin tops $60K amid Fed inflation talks: Is bull trap or $65K next?
item.description: Bitcoin rallied above $60,000 despite Federal Reserve rate hike fears and steady outflows from the BTC spot ETFs. Is the rally a bull trap?

item.title: NEW: El Salvador bought another BTC for its Strategic Bitcoin Reserve today 🇸🇻 They now own 7700 BTC! 👏 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBHVEdDRFFJUV9YVWJ6clgtZ1RZekJmMWJOdkh1bmJoTkFoRmRuZTczbUFXRDFaZDF1RmVhRHFmNml4LVJKVUhlcEtKYzhOSEpzTU9FSFh5VXRIV1h1dG5qcWJzV2tqZEE?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: El Salvador bought ano…

item.title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain, plans crypto trading for UK residents
item.description: The company announced a suite of DeFi products, plans for launching crypto trading in the UK and its public mainnet after months of testing.

item.title: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
item.description: Brokerage and crypto exchange Robinhood opened the public mainnet for its Arbitrum-powered Ethereum layer-2 network on Wednesday.

item.title: Venice AI Valued at $1 Billion as Erik Voorhees Makes the Case for Private ChatGPT Rivals
item.description: Venice reached a $1 billion valuation as founder Erik Voorhees argued AI companies should protect users' conversations.

item.title: OFAC Updates ISIS-Khorasan Sanctions with Over 100 Cryptocurrency Wallets
item.description: Summary OFAC updated its ISIS Khorasan (ISIS-K) designation to include 134 cryptocurrency wallet addresses (131 on TRON and 3 on… The post OFAC Updates ISIS-Khorasan Sanctions with Over 100 Cryptocurrency Wallets appeared first on Chainaly…

item.title: LongCat-2.0: The Stealth AI Model That Was Quietly Topping OpenRouter All Along
item.description: The 1.6 trillion-parameter mixture-of-experts model spent two months disguised as "Owl Alpha" before Meituan claimed it—and it undercuts GPT-5.5 and Claude Sonnet 5 on price by a wide margin.

item.title: Chainalysis Supports Robinhood Chain with Automatic Token Support
item.description: Chainalysis is excited to announce support for Robinhood Chain, a permissionless layer 2 purpose-built for on-chain financial services and tokenized… The post Chainalysis Supports Robinhood Chain with Automatic Token Support appeared first…

item.title: UN's First AI Safety Panel Says Scientists Can't Rule Out 'Catastrophic Harm'
item.description: A 40-scientist panel found that AI capabilities are outrunning both scientific understanding and government oversight.

item.title: Ethereum Institutional @ethereuminsti will play a central and key role as a neutral entity bringing institutional adoption to ethereum ethereum:native In their words… “What’s been missing for Ethereum to date is a neutral counterpart on the other side of the tabl - x.com

item.title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin Hits New Low Price Ahead of Reverse Stock Split
item.description: Bitcoin mining firm American Bitcoin fell to a new low price Wednesday, one day before executing a 1-for-15 reverse stock split.

item.title: BitMine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin Accelerate Wall Street Ethereum Push With Nonprofit Launch
item.description: Ethereum Institutional will serve as a point of contact for financial institutions seeking to get more involved with on-chain infrastructure.

item.title: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat
item.description: Analysts don't think the threat of a new stablecoin launch was enough to warrant a major Circle (CRCL) sell-off on Tuesday.

item.title: I stated that I ignore Bitcoin as an investment in the 1st half of midterm years. The second half of midterm years usually marks the accumulation zone/market cycle bottom. Today (July 1st), Bitcoin put in a new low, justifying the views I held for the 1st half of the y - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin Pops Off 21-Month Low to $60K as Soft Data Eases Rate-Hike Fears
item.description: BTC recovered from local lows to $60,000 after softer U.S. jobs and factory data revived hopes the Fed's hawkish turn could be easing.

item.title: Ahead of NYSE Listing, Securitize Exec Says DeFi Can Break Wall Street's Grip on Stock Lending
item.description: Securitize President Brett Redfearn argues that tokenization will bring crypto's core benefit of disintermediation to retail investors.

item.title: Anthropic Bringing Claude Fable 5 Back Online as US Lifts Export Controls
item.description: The Trump administration reversed its shutdown order after weeks of talks, with Anthropic tying Fable 5's return to a new safety classifier and other moves.

item.title: 1/ Today, the Global Policy Strategy (GPS) team is publishing Ethereum Basics for Governments and Institutions, a non-technical primer to equip the leaders making policy and deployment decisions with an understanding of how Ethereum works, how it's gove - x.com

item.title: Forward Industries Shares Spike as Leading Solana Treasury Adds $38 Million in SOL
item.description: Shares in top Solana treasury firm Forward Industries are jumping Wedesday after announcing that it added over 500,000 SOL to its stash.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 U.S. M2 money supply surpasses $23 trillion for the first time in history 👀 This is why we Bitcoin. Prepare accordingly 🚀 - x.com

item.title: Morning Minute: Major New Stablecoin Launch Shakes Incumbents
item.description: Open USD takes a shot at USDC and USDT, with backing from heavy hitters including Visa, Mastercard and Google.

item.title: Bitcoin is now down over 54% from its peak last October, its biggest and longest drawdown since 2022. bitcoin:native Video: youtube.com/watch?v=F_-VTZ… - x.com

item.title: Taiwan Passes Sweeping Crypto Law With Licensing, Stablecoin Rules
item.description: The new law puts virtual asset firms under FSC oversight for the first time and sets reserve-and-trust rules for stablecoins.

item.title: THE WINKLEVOSS TWINS ARE SELLING BITCOIN The Winklevoss Twins just moved $60M of BTC to Gemini, and $7M of ETH. This activity pattern matches usual selling patterns (custody > hot wallet). The Winklevosses still hold over $300M of BTC. They ma - x.com

item.title: Goliath Ventures CEO Pleads Guilty to $250M Crypto Ponzi Scheme
item.description: Christopher Delgado’s "liquidity pool" fraud took in at least $400 million, with the proceeds spent on mansions, Lamborghinis, and Rolexes.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $58,000 as levered liquidations accelerate. - x.com

item.title: Ethereum for Governments and Institutions: Why neutral infrastructure matters now
item.description: Current global shifts clearly signal a critical need for shared, neutral digital public infrastructure outside the control of any single centralized actor. As a public, programmable network designed to operate without reliance on any singl…

item.title: Trump Discloses Over $1.2 Billion in Crypto Earnings, $50M in Bitcoin Holdings
item.description: The president’s annual financial disclosure report was released on Tuesday.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vice President JD Vance discloses owning $250,001 to $500,000 in Bitcoin. - x.com
